# Wind-Model-Identification
# classification.py for training classification network
# log_wind_param_regression.py, shear_layer_param_regression.py, updraft_param_regression.py for the three parameter-regression networks respectively
# the training samples are generated by classification_sample_generate.m, log_reg_sample_generate.m, shear_reg_sample_generate.m, updraft_reg_sample_generate.m respectively
